topic: A Sanad office in Muscat moved 40 client work permits off WhatsApp — no missed renewals in six months
format: Tight case study: company profile, problem, what changed, the one number that proves it worked
post:
40 work permits. Tracked across WhatsApp threads, forwarded PDFs, and one person's memory.

That's how a Sanad office in Muscat was running things — until it wasn't.

Six months later: zero missed renewals.

They moved every permit, renewal date, and client file into SmartPro Hub. One dashboard. Automated renewal alerts. Clients logging into a white-label portal instead of digging through a chat thread buried under weekend memes.

Renewals flagged 60 days out. Clients stopped calling for status updates because they could just check for themselves. No more "I thought you were handling that."

40 permits. Six months. Zero lapses.

PRO service firms and Sanad offices across Oman are running this same setup now. The ones still on WhatsApp groups are one missed renewal away from losing a client they can't afford to lose.

That's a bad way to find out your process doesn't scale.

SmartPro Hub was built specifically for this — the permits, the deadlines, the client communication that currently lives in someone's head or scroll history.

If you're managing work permits, what does your tracking actually look like right now?

Book a 20-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=general
